Dates Services Calendars & Key Dates Registrar Calendars & Key Dates Academic Calendars Explore SIUE’s academic calendar as well as future academic calendars. Find key dates, deadlines and information including holidays, registration dates, payment deadlines and more. Spring 2026 Summer 2026 Fall 2026 Other Service Calendars Registration Calendar -This calendar shows registration dates, different parts of term, their start date, either end date and their withdrawal deadlines. Graduation Calendar - This calendar shows graduation application deadlines and commencement dates. Grading Calendar - This calendar shows the deadlines for faculty to submit grades. Scheduling Calendar - This calendar shows when reserve seating is released, CPI edits are due, and when class scheduling are due. Â
